Description: Block legacy authentication protocols (POP IMAP SMTP AUTH older clients).
Rationale: Legacy auth bypasses Conditional Access. Blocking is baseline Zero Trust hygiene.

Description: Require MFA for all users accessing cloud apps.
Rationale: Phishing-resistant authentication baseline for all workforce identities.

Description: Require MFA for all directory roles with strict session sign-in frequency.
Rationale: Privileged identities require stronger session controls than standard users.

Description: Block admin sign-ins from locations outside trusted lab countries.
Rationale: Optional lab policy demonstrating location-based admin protection. Configure trusted named locations first.
